note: Curated FT pull targets, by priority country/theme. After priming the session (ft_login.py --persistent), run `ft_api.py search "<query>"`, pick the best result URLs, `ft_api.py scrape <url>`, then `node scripts/ingest-ft.mjs`. Set status to 'pulled' once ingested.
